content.problemStatement:
Read problem statements in Vietnamese,Find KKK distinct numbers in the range [1,N][1, N][1,N] such that the bitwise XOR of all the numbers is maximized. Print **any** set of these numbers that maximize the XOR.

###Input


The first line contains an integer TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains a single line of input, two integers NNN, KKK.
###Output
For each test case, output KKK distinct integers in any order as described in the problem.

###Constraints


1≤T≤1041 \leq T \leq 10^41≤T≤104
1≤K≤N≤1061 \leq K \leq N \leq 10^61≤K≤N≤106
The sum of NNN over all queries is at most 4⋅1064\cdot 10^64⋅106.
The sum of KKK over all queries is at most 2⋅1062\cdot 10^62⋅106.
###Subtasks
**Subtask #1 (5 points):**


1≤T≤501 \leq T \leq 501≤T≤50
1≤K≤N≤201 \leq K \leq N \leq 201≤K≤N≤20
**Subtask #2 (20 points):**


1≤T≤501 \leq T \leq 501≤T≤50
1≤K≤N≤2001 \leq K \leq N \leq 2001≤K≤N≤200
The sum of NNN over all queries is at most 800800800.
The sum of KKK over all queries is at most 400400400.
constraints: **Test Case 111:** The only possible set is {10}\{10\}{10} which gives the value 101010.
**Test Case 222:** The other possible set is {9,6}\{9, 6\}{9,6} which gives the value 9⊕6=15=7⊕89 \oplus 6 = 15 = 7 \oplus 89⊕6=15=7⊕8.

**Test Case 333:** The only possible set is {1,2,3,4,5,6,8}\{1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8\}{1,2,3,4,5,6,8} which gives the value 1⊕2⊕3⊕4⊕5⊕6⊕8=151 \oplus 2 \oplus 3 \oplus 4 \oplus 5 \oplus 6 \oplus 8 = 151⊕2⊕3⊕4⊕5⊕6⊕8=15.
